metadata.description: Diab Neiroukh's Claude Code plugins in one place.

plugins.name: mempalace-hooks
plugins.description: Wires the mempalace memory server into Claude Code: two directive hooks that load palace context and pull the user's writing/coding voice, plus a session diary and a /remember handoff for cross-session continuity. MCP-first, with a mempalace-CLI fallback when the MCP isn't connected, and no auto-mining.

plugins.name: system-design
plugins.description: Cloud-agnostic system design across AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud: a six-step Well-Architected loop. Auto-engages for architecture and service-selection work.

plugins.name: 4man
plugins.description: A four-role dev crew (Planner, parallel Coders and Testers, and a fan-out Reviewer) that builds and reviews features in the requestor's own style. Auto-engages for feature work.

plugins.name: realfavicon-mcp
plugins.description: Bundles the realfavicon-mcp MCP server: generate favicon assets and HTML from a master image, audit a live page's favicon setup, and query the RealFaviconGenerator change-log.

plugins.name: offshore
plugins.description: Bundles the offshore MCP server. Forwards refused prompts to a local abliterated model (Ollama, LM Studio, vLLM, or any OpenAI-compatible endpoint) and returns the unrestricted reply.

plugins.name: prompt-engineering
plugins.description: Turn a description into an optimized, ready-to-paste LLM prompt for a Gemini Gem, Claude Project, or custom GPT, grounded in the promptingguide.ai guide. Works offline via a bundled distilled reference. Auto-engages when you write or refine a prompt.

plugins.name: also
plugins.description: The action-counterpart to Claude Code's built-in /btw: dispatch a side task to a separate fork sub-agent that inherits the session's power level — reasoning effort (incl. max/xhigh), ultracode, and model — plus full context and full tools, so a tangential job gets done without derailing the main one. User-invoked as /also <task>.

plugins.name: fableplan
plugins.description: Plan with Fable 5, execute with Opus: an opusplan-style dual-model setup for Claude Code. Tracked as a submodule of the lzlrd/fableplan fork.

plugins.name: reload-claude-md
plugins.description: A /reload-claude-md command that re-reads the in-effect CLAUDE.md memory files from disk and re-anchors the session to their current content, so mid-session edits take effect without a restart. Claude Code loads CLAUDE.md only at session start and has no native reload; this fills that gap. Read-only and user-invoked.

plugins.name: export-skills
plugins.description: Deduce which locally-installed Claude Code skills can run in Claude Desktop / claude.ai and package the qualifiers into upload-ready zips. Inventories plugin and personal skills correctly (latest version, symlinks resolved, no marketplace dupes), classifies each against Desktop's sandbox and MCP list, and curates clean zips with SKILL.md at every folder root. Lenient by default; pass --strict for a zero-code-execution reading. User-invoked as /export-skills.
